creative_brief: Split-screen visual: left shows industrial cold storage facility with '21 DAYS' overlay, right shows Rachel's cattle grazing green pastures with 'DAYS FROM FARM' text.
primary_text: 21 days. That's how long supermarket beef sits in cold storage after its 2,400km journey from feedlot. Rachel Ward's grass-fed cattle graze 300km north of Sydney. Her beef reaches our Brookvale hub within days of processing. No feedlots. No hormones. No middlemen marking up the price. Order when you want. Collect Monday to Friday. We can't promise returns, but we're building something better than supermarkets.
headline: 21 days in cold storage vs days from farm
description: Grass-fed beef direct from NSW regenerative farms. Equity crowdfunding now open on Birchal. Not financial advice.
